creator: rigoletto@freebsd.org
text:
I found a problem. 

'security/p5-Crypt-CBC' and 'security/p5-Crypt-Rijndael' are just needed when at least one of the OPTIONS_GROUP_CRYPTO is ON.

I tried setting CRYPTO_RUN_DEPENDS in a hope of covering the entire group, but didn't work.

So, the only two possible solutions coming to mind are:

1 - set those dependencies in the general RUN_DEPENDS or 
2 - repeat them to each OPTION of the group.

Basically bloated vs. ugly, unless there is proper solution I am not aware of.

Thanks!
